title: Khandan
writer: N.S. Bedi, A. Bhimsingh, Rajendra Krishan
plot: After the passing of Ramswaroop Lal, his two sons, Jeevandas and Shankar take over the control of their farmland. Jeevandas marries Bhagvanti and has no children, while Shankar marries Parvati and has two sons, Govind and Shyam. D...
